awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated collection of awesome OCaml tools, frameworks, libraries and articles.
awesomeList.description: A curated collection of awesome OCaml tools, frameworks, libraries and articles.

nodes.itemHTML: • OCaml: Learn & Code iOS app - Learn and execute OCaml code from your iPhone/iPad/Mac.
• Functional Programming in OCaml: A Principled Approach - Textbook for CS 3110 Functional Programming in OCaml, Cornell University.
• ocephesstars10 - Bindings to frequently used C special functions library.
• lablgtk — GTK2 and GTK3 bindings for OCaml with various higher-level facilities to define GUIs.
• OCaml Style Guide (by Jane Street) - See also: [1], [2], [3].
• A safe but strange way of modifying OCaml compiler
• Programming Language Examples Alike Cookbook - The OCaml section of the book is a free reference for solving common programming problems using OCaml.
• Basestars505 - Standard library for OCaml
• cilstars273 - C Intermediate Language
• coqstars3.3k - formal proof management system
• frama-c - platform dedicated to the analysis of source code written in C
• libguestfsstars433 - library and tools for accessing and modifying virtual machine disk images
• Liquidsoapstars751 - a swiss-army knife for multimedia streaming, notably used for netradios and webtvs
• miragestars1.6k - library operating system that constructs unikernels for secure, high-performance network applications across a variety of cloud computing and mobile platforms
• MLDonkeystars150 - cross-platform multi-network peer-to-peer daemon

• pfffstars103 - an OCaml API to write static analysis, dynamic analysis, code visualizations, code navigations, or style-preserving source-to-source transformations such as refactorings on source code.
• WHY3 - platform for deductive program verification
• xen-apistars307 - management stack that configures and controls Xen-enabled hosts and resource pools, and co-ordinates resources within the pool
• cborstars15 — OCaml native CBOR decoder/encoder.
• expect-teststars79 — A framework for writing tests in OCaml, similar to Cram, developed by JaneStreet.
• dromstars115 - The drom tool is a wrapper over opam/dune in an attempt to provide a cargo-like user experience.
• Darkstars769 - a combined language, editor, and infrastructure to make it easy to build backends
• Oni2stars5.8k - Native, lightweight modal code editor
• spinstars256 - Reason and Ocaml project generator
• modern-ocamlstars47 - Template for an ocaml project with modern tooling
• Camelotstars20 - Camelot is a modular and fully configurable OCaml linter and stylechecker.

• pfffstars103 – pfff is a set of tools and APIs to perform some static analysis, dynamic analysis, code visualizations, code navigations, or style-preserving source-to-source transformations such as refactorings on source code.
• ORaftstars4 - Library of Raft consensus algorithm implemented in OCaml

• Libraries
    • Ocaml-sklearnstars22 scikit-learn for OCaml.
    • Owl - Scientific library with neural networks, algoritmic differentiation and ONNX support.
    • Object detection convolutional neural network with OCaml (based on Owl)stars16.
    • PyTorch bindingsstars313 - OCaml bindings for PyTorch.

• Articles
    • Deep Learning with OCaml (PyTorch bindings).
    • Transfer Learning with OCaml (PyTorch bindings).
    • Reinforcement Learning with OCaml (PyTorch bindings).
• Camomilestars104 — A Unicode library for OCaml.
• ocaml-m17nstars42 — Multilingualization for OCaml source code. Allows using Unicode identifiers in OCaml source code.
• Uucdstars9 — Unicode character database decoder for OCaml.
• Uucpstars14 — Unicode character properties for OCaml.
• Uunfstars11 — Unicode text normalization for OCaml.
• Uusegstars12 — Unicode text segmentation for OCaml.
• Uutfstars21 — Non-blocking streaming Unicode codec for OCaml.
• Inlined records in constructors
• cwe_checkerstars401 - cwe_checker finds vulnerable patterns in binary executables.
• OCaml-RDF – OCaml library to manipulate RDF graphs and execute Sparql queries.
• nocoinerstars6 - A Commitment Schemes library for Multi-party Computations such as online Auctions and Gambling.
• ocaml-linenoisestars37 - Self-contained OCaml bindings to linenoise, easy high level readline functionality in OCaml.
• Decompressstars98 - A pure OCaml implementation of Zlib.
• Kestars29 - Fast implementation of queue (FIFO) in OCaml.
• Duffstars16 - Implementation of Rabin's fingerprint and delta compression by P. MacDonald in OCaml (same as libXdiff
• yojsonstars196 — An optimized parsing and printing library for the JSON format.
• OCaml for Scientists - by Jon Harrop.

• Embedded systems
    • OMicroBstars90 - A virtual machine designed to run OCaml bytecode on AVR (Arduino for instance) micro-controlers.
    • OCaPIC - An OCaml virtual machine for PIC18 micro-controlers.
    • ocaml-esp32stars18 - A compiler for ESP32 SoC.

• core_benchstars36 – Micro-benchmarking library for OCaml by Jane Street.
    • Getting Started with Core_bench
• benchmarkstars25 – Benchmarking functions for measuring the run-time of functions using latency or throughput.
• prometheusstars26 – OCaml client library for Prometheus monitoring.
• capnp-ocamlstars76 – OCaml code generator plugin for the Cap'n Proto serialization framework.
• Why We Use OCaml
• Algebraic Data Types
• Official OCaml Website
• OCaml Planet
• OCaml SubReddit
• Comparing a Machine Learning Algorithm Implemented in F# and OCaml
• Type OCaml – Many things about OCaml

• More OCaml: Algorithms, Methods, and Diversions – In More OCaml John Whitington takes a meandering tour of functional programming with OCaml, introducing various language features and describing some classic algorithms. The book ends with a large worked example dealing with the production of PDF files. There are questions for each chapter together with worked answers and hints.

• Pearls of Functional Algorithm Design by Richard Bird - It summaries 30 hard algorithm problems in function programming world. Although it is for Haskell, the algorithm problems are very interesting and trying to solve them in OCaml also helps the thinking of functional programming. Partial solutions in OCaml are herestars18.
• Unix System Programming in OCaml by X. Leroy and D. Rémy – Introduction to Unix system programming, with an emphasis on communications between processes.
• Using, Understanding, and Unraveling OCaml – This book describes both the OCaml language and the theoretical grounds behind its powerful type system.
• Purely Functional Data Structures - This is the first or only book focus on various data structures in FP world. A must-read one.
• ISO8601stars27
• Try OCaml – Try OCaml in your web browser.
• 99 problems. 99% solutions are herestars23.

• Coq – Coq is a formal proof management system. It provides a formal language to write mathematical definitions, executable algorithms and theorems together with an environment for semi-interactive development of machine-checked proofs.

• Lambda-Termstars171 – Lambda-Term is a cross-platform library for manipulating the terminal. It provides an abstraction for keys, mouse events, colors, as well as a set of widgets to write curses-like applications.
• Fiddling with the OCaml Type System
• OCaml polymorphism example other than template function?
• OCaml - polymorphic print and type losing
• Kaputt — comprehensive testing framework.
• ocaml-cuidstars16 - Collision-resistant IDs for server scalability & database performance.
• Inferstars12.3k - Infer is a static analyzer for Java, C and Objective-C
• Frama-C - Frama-C is a static analysis and formal proof framework for C and C++
• BAPstars1.4k - BAP is a reverse engineering and program analysis platform that targets binary programs.
• BinCatstars1.1k - BinCat is a binary code static analysis toolkit.
• Jupyterstars185 – An OCaml kernel for the Jupyter notebook.
• utopstars650 – Universal toplevel for OCaml with support of multiline edition, history, real-time and context sensitive completion, colors, and more.
• ocamlformatstars395 - A command-line tool to format OCaml code.
• ocaml-zmqstars68 – ZeroMQ bindings for OCaml with Async and Lwt wrappers.
• owlstars928 - OCaml numerical library: dense and sparse matrix, linear algebra, regressions, maths and stats functions.
• Alcoteststars258 – A lightweight and colourful test framework.
• OCaml Discord Chat
• Digestifstars72 - Hash algorithms (like SHA* or BLAKE2*) in OCaml and C.
• ocamlbrowser – A source and compiled interface browser, written using LablTk. Included in the standard distribution for ocaml <= 4.01 and with labltk for ocaml >= 4.02.

• Code coverage:
    • Bisect_ppxstars209

• Editor Integration:
    • merlinstars1.3k – Context sensitive completion for Ocaml in Vim and Emacs.
    • tuaregstars292 - OCaml mode for Emacs that can run the toplevel and the debugger within Emacs.
    • merlin-eldocstars36 – Emacs package to provide merlin's features through eldoc.
    • vscode-ocamlstars175 – extension that provides OCaml language support for VSCodestars115.6k
    • OCaml Debuggerstars121 – extension that provides OCaml Debugger for VSCodestars115.6k
    • Sublime better ocamlstars21 – Better OCaml mode for Sublime Text.
      • Sublime text packagestars13
    • ocp-index – Easy access to the interface information of installed OCaml libraries. Provides standalone tools like ocp-browser and ocp-grep.
      • ocp-browser – Small ncurses-based API and documentation browser.
      • ocp-index-topstars18 – Toplevel directive for looking up documentation using ocp-index.
      • Sublime text package
    • ocp-indent – Indentation tool for OCaml, to be used from editors like Emacs and Vim.
      • Vim pluginstars27.
• ocaml-containersstars372 – A lightweight, modular standard library extension, string library and interfaces to various libraries (bigarrays, unix, etc...). BSD license.
• OCaml Discourse Web Forum
• obandit - OCaml library for multi-armed bandits.
• Drup's Thingies
• lablqmlstars137 – QML Qt5 bindings for OCaml.
• labltk — Interface to the Tcl/Tk GUI framework. In the standard distribution for ocaml <= 4.01.
• TSDL – Tsdl is an OCaml module providing thin bindings to the cross-platform SDL library.
• Nottystars254 - Notty is a declarative terminal library for OCaml, structured around a notion of composable images.
• cryptokitstars68 – The Cryptokit library for OCaml provides a variety of cryptographic primitives that can be used to implement cryptographic protocols in security-sensitive applications.
• Miniclistars20 – Minimalist library for command line parsing.
• Corestars876 – Jane Street Capital's full-fledged standard library overlay. A portable subset of Core is also available: Core_kernelstars213.

• Libraries:
    • Lwt — A cooperative threads library for OCaml.
    • Async — A monadic concurrence library to go with the Core library.

• Articles:
    • The blog post that introduced Async
    • A user gives up on Async
    • Cooperative Concurrency in OCaml: A Core.Std.Async Example.

• nocryptostars105 – A small cryptographic library behind the ocaml-tls project. It is built to be straightforward to use, adhere to functional programming principles and able to run in a Xen-based unikernel.
• MemCADstars21 - MemCAD is an abstract interpreter for shape analysis. MemCAD can verify C programs manipulating complex data structures.
• onanomsgstars39 – nanomsg bindings for OCaml.
• Kafkastars43 – OCaml bindings for Apache Kafka.
• AMQPstars57 – AMQP client library for Async and Lwt.
• MPIstars19 – Message Passing Interface bindings for OCaml.
• MQTTstars20 – OCaml implementation of the MQTT pubsub protocol.
• Basestars505 - Jane Street Capital's dependency-free, quick-compiling, fully-portable across any environment that can run OCaml code standard library.
• University of Illinois - Course that uses OCaml to teach functional programming and programming language design
• tensorflow-ocamlstars274 – OCaml bindings for TensorFlow.
• codingground – Compile and execute OCaml code online.
• slapstars75 - A linear algebra library in OCaml with type-based static size checking for matrix operations.
• OUnit – OUnit is a unit test framework for OCaml. It allows one to easily create unit-tests for OCaml code. It is based on HUnit, a unit testing framework for Haskell.

• Languages and Compilers:

    • Caramel - Caramel is a functional language for building type-safe, scalable, and maintainable applications.

    • cDuce - cDuce is a modern XML-oriented functional language with innovative features.

    • Compcert C Compiler - It is a C Compiler supporting most of the ISO C90 and C99 / ANSI C features.

    • Eff Programming Language - Eff is a functional language with handlers of not only exceptions, but also of other computational effects such as state or I/O.

    • Hack Programming Language

    • Haxe Programming Language

    • Neko Programming Language - Originally the compiler was written in OCaml.

    • Mezzo Programming Language - Mezzo is a programming language in the ML tradition, which places strong emphasis on the control of aliasing and access to mutable memory.

    • OCaml-Java - OCaml to Java bytecode compiler.

    • Opa Programming Language

    • Rhinestars623 – A Lisp on LLVM written in OCaml.

    • Rust Programming Language - Originally written in OCaml before bootstrapping.

    • Quick C-- Target Language - It is now a dead project. Github Repostars121. Alternative website.

    • tis-interpreterstars519 - An interpreter for finding subtle bugs in programs written in standard C

    • Reason - Friendly syntax & toolchain for OCaml by Facebook.

    • RaML - Resource Aware ML (RaML) is a tool that automatically and statically computes resource-use bounds for OCaml programs.
• Introduction to Functional Programming in OCaml.
• ptime
• calendar
• odatestars21
• charrua-unixstars12 - charrua-unix is a Unix DHCP daemon based on charrua-corestars54.
• Tyrestars145 - Tyre is a set of combinators to build type-safe regular expressions, allowing automatic extraction and modification of matched groups.
• Logs - Logs provides a logging infrastructure for OCaml.
• SLAyerstars317 - SLAyer is an automatic formal verification tool that uses separation logic to verify memory safety of C programs.

• Bindings:
    • Cordova pluginsstars24 – List of bindings to Cordova plugins. Get access to native device components like accelerometer, SMS, geolocation, etc in OCaml.
• OCaml Yeoman Generatorstars21 – Yeoman generator to scaffold OCaml modules.
• Learn X in Y minutes - Where X=OCaml.
• lacaml - OCaml bindings for BLAS/LAPACK (high-performance linear algebra Fortran libraries).
• fluent-loggerstars6 – Fluentd logger for OCaml.
• OCaml at Exercism – Exercism is your place to engage in thoughtful conversations about code. Explore simplicity, idiomatic language features, and expressive readable code. Solutionsstars66.
• flowstars21.3k - flow is a static type checker for JavaScript
• TestSimplestars13 - A lightweight unit testing framework compatible with the Test Anything Protocol.
• iTeMLstars53 (formerly known as qtest) — supports inline pragma's to generate tests.
• Pa_test — General inline testing macro's.
• omlstars111 - OCaml library for general numerical work.
• Cornell University – Data Structures and Functional Programming.
• Humane-restars24 – Humane-re attempts to provide an easy interface for 90% of your regex needs Courtesy of ocaml-re
• Restars173 – a pure OCaml regular expressions library with combinators, supporting several formats (glob, posix, str...)
• ocaml-pcrestars23 – bindings to the PCRE library (perl-compatible regular expressions)
• sexplibstars110 – A S-expression parser and printer
• Gagallium
• OCaml Platform
• slackostars64 – A neat interface for Slack in OCaml.
• onumericalstars8 – Numerical library for OCaml.
• guizminstars4 – OCaml library for building bioinformatics pipelines.
• combinestars28 – OCaml library for combinatorics https://www.lri.fr/~filliatr/combine/.
• XEN – OCaml Best Practices for Developers
• biocamlstars101 – OCaml Bioinformatics Library http://biocaml.org.
• odsstars38 – A large collection of data structures and algorithms for OCaml.

• Articles:
    • OCaml on iOS 7 Released
    • OCaml + Cordova = more secured, typed and hybrid mobile applications

• Articles:
    • Kaleidoscope: Implementing a Language with LLVM in Objective Caml¶

• Open Source Projects:
    • Cumulusstars44 – Hacker news like website with the OCaml framework Ocsigen

• Articles:
    • A Guide to Extension Points in OCaml
    • Extension Points, or how OCaml is becoming more like Lisp
    • Syntax extensions without Camlp4: let's do it!
    • Reading Camlp4 – Ambassador to the Computers

• Syntax Extensions:
    • ppx_importstars71 – Import is a syntax extension that allows to pull in types or signatures from other compiled interface files.
    • ppx_string_interpolatestars19 – A simple ppx filter to support string interpolation like [%str "value of foo is $(foo)"].
    • ppx_monadstars7 – Monad syntax extension for OCaml.
    • ppx_deriving_yojsonstars118 – A Yojson codec generator for OCaml.

• Tools and Language Extensions:
    • MetaOCaml – an OCaml dialect for multi-stage programming.
    • Fan – Fan is a compile-time metaprogramming system for OCaml, originally inspired from Camlp4. It's a combination of OCaml and Lispy Macros. It shares the same concrete syntax with OCaml.
    • camlp5 - Camlp5 is a preprocessor-pretty-printer of OCaml.
    • camlp4 - Camlp4 is part of the standard OCaml distribution and is different from Camlp5.

• Why3 – Why3 is a platform for deductive program verification. It provides a rich language for specification and programming, called WhyML, and relies on external theorem provers, both automated and interactive, to discharge verification conditions.
• Alt-Ergo – Alt-Ergo is an open-source SMT solver dedicated to the proof of mathematical formulas generated in the context of program verification.

• Foreign Function Interface:
    • ctypesstars288 – Library for binding to C libraries using pure OCaml.
    • ocaml-main-program-in-cstars15 – Example build system for making mixed C/Ocaml binaries where the main program is in C.
    • Modular foreign function bindings
    • Py.mlstars96 - OCaml bindings for Python.
• camlPDFstars145 – OCaml library for reading, writing and modifying PDF files.
• (Functional) Alternatives to inheritance
• Mascot - Mascot is a style-checker for OCaml sources

• Parser and Lexer Generators:
    • Opalstars105 – Self-contained monadic parser combinators for OCaml.
    • Sedlexstars156 is a modern, encoding-agnostic (read: Unicode-supporting) lexer generator (the ppx-based successor to ulex.)
    • Menhir – Menhir is a LR(1) parser generator for OCaml.
      • See ocaml-parsingstars93 for a clearer example of using Menhir and Sedlex to produce a useful parser,
      • ... and Obeliskstars29, a neat project to produce readable LaTeX, HTML, or plain-text EBNF-style documentation for your grammar.
    • ocamllex/ocamlyacc – lex and yacc implementation for OCaml.
    • Angstromstars444 - Parser combinators built for speed and memory efficiency
• A blog about game development in OCaml
• QCheckstars196 — QCheck is a property testing library inspired from Haskell's QuickCheck
• Rosetta Code
• dologstars26 – A dumb OCaml logger.
• ghimstars18 – A command-line tool to manage Github Issues.
• Batteries Includedstars418 – A community-maintained foundation library for your OCaml projects.
• Why OCaml, why now?

• HTTP Tools:
    • ocaml-cohttpstars544 – Very lightweight HTTP server using Lwt or Async.
    • ocurlstars45 – OCaml bindings to libcurl.
    • httpafstars464 – A high performance, memory efficient, and scalable web server written in OCaml.
• Official OCaml Mailing List

• Distribution:
    • OPAM – A flexible Git-friendly package manager with multiple compiler support.
    • ocamlfind — Local OCaml library manager. Used by most of the OCaml ecosystem.
    • OCaml for Windows - opam repository and experimental build for Windows.
    • makorelstars8 – Release OPAM packages easily.
    • esystars725 - package.json workflow for native development with Reason/OCaml.

• Build Tools:
    • Oasis - A tool to integrate a configure, build and install system in your OCaml project. It helps to create standard entry points in your build system and allows external tools to analyse your project easily.
      • oasis2opamstars28 — Tool to convert OASIS metadata to OPAM package descriptions.
    • obuildstars50 – Simple package build system for ocaml.
    • dunestars1.1k – A composable and opinionated build system for OCaml (former jbuilder)
    • jengastars89 – Monadic build system from Jane Street.
    • ocamlbuild — Build system provided with the compiler.
    • ocaml-makefilestars67 — Easy to use Makefile for small to medium-sized OCaml-projects.
    • topkgstars65 — OPAM-aware packaging system using ocamlbuild.
    • Namespacesstars69 - ocamlbuild plugin that converts your directory tree into nested modules.
    • Bazelstars37 - OCaml rules for Bazel, Google's multi-language and platform build tool.
• OCamlgraphstars163 – A generic graph library for OCaml.
• ocaml-rpcstars76 – Light library to deal with RPCs in OCaml.

• How to Think Like a (Functional) Programmer by Allen Downey and Nicholas Monje – How to Think Like a Computer Scientist is an introductory programming textbook based on the OCaml language. It is a modified version of Think Python by Allen Downey. It is intended for newcomers to programming and also those who know some programming but want to learn programming in the function-oriented paradigm, or those who simply want to learn OCaml.
• OCaml from the Very Beginning by J. Whitington - OCaml from the Very Beginning will appeal both to new programmers, and experienced programmers eager to explore functional languages such as OCaml.
• Beginner's guide to OCaml

• Libraries:
    • Parmap — Provides easy-to-use parallel map and fold functions.
    • ForkWorkstars20 — A simple library for forking child processes to perform work on multiple cores.
    • Functory — A distributed computing library which facilitates distributed execution of parallelizable computations in a seamless fashion.
    • Rpc.Parallelstars43 — A library for spawning processes on a cluster of machines, and passing typed messages between them.
    • Ocamlnet — An enhanced system platform library. Contains the netmulticore library to compute tasks on as many cores of the machine as needed.
    • Nprocstars29 – Process pool implementation for OCaml.
    • Paranystars29 – Parallelize computation over independent items, even if there is an infinite number of them.
    • Sklml – Functional parallel skeleton compiler and programming system for OCaml programs.
    • SPOCstars114 - Libraries and syntax extensions to offload intensive computations to parallel accelerators (multicore CPUs, GPUs and other accelerators compatible with GPGPU frameworks).

• Articles:
    • What is the state of OCaml's parallelization abilities?
• Cmdlinerstars182 – Declarative definition of command line interfaces for OCaml.
• React – React is an OCaml module for functional reactive programming (FRP). It provides support to program with time varying values: declarative events and signals.
• easy-formatstars29 – Pretty-printing library for OCaml.
• Real World OCaml by Y. Minsky, A. Madhavapeddy and J. Hickey - Functional programming for the masses.
• Functional Programming with OCaml
• Python to OCaml: retrospective
• OCaml for the Masses
• Xen – OCaml Coding Considerations
• Monads are a class of hard drugs
• Higher-Rank Polymorphism in OCaml
• mikmatchstars21 – OCaml pattern-matching extended with regexps
• Voltstars5 – A variant of Bolt OCaml logging tool.
• ocaml-dnsstars69 – A pure OCaml implementation of the DNS protocol.
• Princeton University - Functional programming in OCaml.
• ocaml-tlsstars254 – TLS in pure OCaml.
• Mirage OSstars1.6k – Mirage is a programming framework for constructing secure, high-performance network applications across a variety of cloud computing and mobile platforms.
• ocaml-fatstars21 – Read and write FAT format filesystems from OCaml.
• ocaml-gitstars312 – Pure OCaml low-level git bindings.
• ocaml-vchanstars42 – Pure OCaml implementation of the "vchan" shared-memory communication protocol.

• Frameworks:
    • Opiumstars631 – Sinatra like web toolkit for OCaml.
    • Ocsigen Eliom – Eliom is a full-featured multi-tier framework, for developing multi-platform Web and mobile apps as 100% OCaml distributed applications. It can also be used for more traditional Web or mobile apps: Web sites, single page applications, REST API, etc.
    • webmachinestars211 – A REST toolkit for OCaml. OCaml webmachine is a layer on top of cohttp that implements a state-machine-based HTTP request processor. It's particularly well-suited for writing RESTful APIs. As the name suggests, this is an OCaml port of the webmachine project.
    • incr_domstars292 - A library for building dynamic webapps, using Js_of_ocaml
    • ocaml-vdomstars155 - Elm architecture and (V)DOM for OCaml

• Tools:
    • COWstars101 – Caml on the Web (COW) is a set of parsers and syntax extensions to let you manipulate HTML, CSS, XML, JSON and Markdown directly from OCaml code.
    • Ocamlnet has many relevant web libraries — Nethtml html parser, Netasn1 for ASN.1 parsing, Netencoding for Base64, Quoted Printable, URL encoding and HTML escaping, Netmime for MIME processing, etc. See the list of modules in Ocamlnet's manual.
    • tyxml — Library to build valid (according to the W3C spec) Html and Svg trees.
    • js_of_ocaml – Js_of_ocaml is a compiler of OCaml bytecode to Javascript. It makes it possible to run Ocaml programs in a Web browser.
      • commonjs_of_ocamlstars13 - Easily import and export CommonJS modules from a js_of_ocaml project.
    • BuckleScriptstars5.2k - BuckleScript is backend for OCaml to generate debuggable Javascript. It enables OCaml to integrate Javascript platform in a seamless way.
    • ocaml-uristars80 – RFC3986 URI parsing library.
    • Gojistars41 – An OCaml bindings generator for JavaScript libraries.
    • Syndicstars29 – RSS and Atom feed parsing
    • ocaml-mustachestars62 – mustache.js logic-less templates in OCaml.
    • atdjsstars9 – atd code generator for OCaml/js_of_ocaml.
    • jingoostars87 – OCaml template engine almost compatible with jinja2.
    • dispatchstars37 – Path-based dispatching for client- and server-side applications.
    • Lambda Soupstars288 - Functional HTML scraping and manipulation with CSS selectors, à la Python's Beautiful Soup.
    • Markup.mlstars124 - Error-recovering streaming HTML5 and XML parsers, serializers.
    • gen_js_apistars146 - gen_js_api aims at simplifying the creation of OCaml bindings for Javascript libraries.
    • routesstars104 - Typed routes for OCaml/ReasonML web applications.

• 2D
    • archimedes — 2D plotting library.
    • cairo2stars36 — Binding to Cairo, a 2D Vector Graphics Library. Integrates well with lablgtk.
    • Vgstars64 – Declarative 2D vector graphics for OCaml.

• 3D
    • glMLitestars16 — OpenGL bindings for OCaml. Provides an (experimental) functional API. (homepage)
    • lablgl — Interface to OpenGL. Integrates well with lablgtk.
    • tgls — Thin bindings OpenGL 3.{2,3},4.{0,1,2,3,4} and OpenGL ES {2,3}.
• bencodestars17 — Bencode (.torrent file format) reader/writer.
• jsonm — Non-blocking streaming JSON codec for OCaml.
• xmlm — A streaming codec to decode and encode the XML data format.

• Bindings
    • Dbm — A binding to the NDBM/GDBM Unix "databases".
    • Mongo.ml – An OCaml driver for Mongodb
    • PG'OCaml — A type-safe interface to PostgreSQL in pure OCaml.
      • ppx_pgsqlstars50 – A syntax extension for embedded SQL queries using PG'OCaml.
    • PostgreSQL-OCaml — An interface to PostgreSQL through the C API (libpq).
    • SQLite3stars77 — OCaml bindings to the SQLite3 database.
    • Sqlite3EZ — Thin wrapper for SQLite3 with a simplified interface.
    • ocaml-redisstars59 – Redis bindings for OCaml.
    • mysql – Bindings to libmysqlclient for interacting with MySQL databases.
    • pgxstars103 – A pure OCaml PostgreSQL client library
• binioustars33 – Extensible binary data format, like JSON but faster.
